name: Domicile Certificate
description: Issued by a state government to prove the applicant is a continuous resident of that state.
eligibility: Must have resided in the state for the mandated minimum years (varies by state).
application_steps: Visit the State e-District portal or Tehsildar office.
Attach proofs showing continuous residence (e.g., consecutive years of school marksheets, old utility bills).
Attach a notarized affidavit declaring stay.
Submit and await field verification by a local officer.

required_documents.name: Proof of Continuous Residence
required_documents.purpose: To prove stay in the state for the mandated period.
required_documents.where_to_get: Old Utility Bills, School/College Certificates spanning multiple years

common_mistakes: Gaps in address proof years (failing to prove *continuous* stay).
Applying immediately after moving to a new state.
Notarized affidavit not in the correct state-prescribed format.
